subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enraptured by the Truth! Praise be unto God, thou dost observe that from the Day of the dawning of the Sun of Guidance from the horizon of Yathrib [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مفتون حقیقت الحمد لله ملاحظه میفرماای که از یوم طلوع نیر هدی از مطلع یثرب و
subcodes.subjects: @outward and inward meanings, @development of capacity and readiness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @suffering and imprisonment
